sources.observed: The Event Timing draft requires support detection through PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes, defines event and first-input entry types, exposes interactionId on PerformanceEventTiming, and sets an effective minimum duration threshold of 16 ms.
Performance Timeline defines the observer and supported-entry-type mechanism used for runtime capability detection.

finding: A standards-linked capability evaluator is insufficient until a browser-side collector derives its inputs from actual runtime interfaces without retaining raw interaction data or browser fingerprint strings.
design_implication: Collect a privacy-bounded capability packet from PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes, PerformanceEventTiming.prototype.interactionId, and performance.eventCounts before replay evidence is evaluated. Unsupported runtimes remain unresolved rather than becoming zero-event successes.

verification.route: isolated Node.js runtime using byte-identical source and test content before commit
coverage: supported runtime produces an observed capability packet
supported strings without interaction interface fail closed
missing eventCounts remains an explicit completeness limit
raw entries, event names, selectors, targets, and user-agent strings are excluded

observed: R-013 had an evaluator but no runtime collector.
The committed collector derives only capability flags and threshold metadata.
inferred: Separating collection from evaluation makes browser support failures explicit and reduces the risk that empty datasets are misclassified as good performance.
proposed: Vercel Studio should invoke the collector in the deployed runtime and attach the packet to bounded replay evidence.
unresolved: No physical iPhone Safari packet has been captured.
No deployed integration has invoked the collector.
The specifications are evolving Editor's Drafts and runtime behavior remains authoritative.

falsification_route: Execute in a runtime lacking Event Timing and require unresolved output.
Compare declared supportedEntryTypes with successful observer construction in target browsers.
Capture a physical iPhone Safari packet and revise assumptions if actual interfaces differ.
Verify downstream replay validation rejects absent or invalid capability packets.
